name: Fresh Tomato Pasta Toss
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup shredded Parmesan cheese or Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan. Dip tomatoes in boiling water and peel the skins away. Discard the skins.
2. Chop the tomato pulp and set aside.
3. In a skillet over medium heat, sauté garlic in oil.
4. Add the tomato pulp, parsley (fresh or dried), basil (fresh or dried), oregano (fresh or dried), salt, sugar, and pepper to the skillet. Mix well.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat.
6. Stir in the cream until heated through.
7. Pour the sauce over hot pasta and toss to coat evenly. Sprinkle with cheese before serving.
Yield: 8 servings
Diabetic exchanges: One serving prepared with Parmesan cheese equals 2 1/2 starches, 1 1/2 fat, 1 vegetable; also 277 calories, 244 mg sodium, 13 mg cholesterol, 46 grams carbohydrate, 9 grams protein, 7 grams fat.
